text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian claims her second crown at the
Japanese Derby. While the entire racing world is
abuzz, Biwa Hayahide speaks at a press
conference for the upcoming Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she declares that not only will she win the
Takarazuka Kinen, she will eventually compete
against her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's more attention on her than ever before.
Meanwhile, I gather data on her competition to
give her the best chance of success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch footage of the Derby for research and am
shocked by the unbelievable speed Narita Brian
can put forth. It's no wonder they call her the
Beast.
